phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy public transit tickets
phrases.cultural_note: Public transport tickets are sold at yellow machines or information counters in the arrivals area.

likely_response.local: V příletové hale, žluté automaty vlevo.
likely_response.translation_en: In the arrivals hall, yellow machines on the left.

responses.english: In the arrivals hall, yellow machines on the left.
responses.local: V příletové hale, žluté automaty vlevo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Eurowings baggage drop is
phrases.text_local: Kde je odbavení zavazadel pro Eurowings?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech airport staff use přepážka (counter) with numbers for precise locations.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if Ryanair boarding pass needs stamp
phrases.text_local: Musím si nechat orazítkovat palubní lístek Ryanair?
phrases.cultural_note: Non-EU carriers like Ryanair often require a document check stamp at the airport desk.

likely_response.local: Ano, u přepážky Ryanair před kontrolou.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, at the Ryanair counter before security.

responses.english: Yes, at the Ryanair counter before security.
responses.local: Ano, u přepážky Ryanair před kontrolou.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the Airport Express bus departs
phrases.cultural_note: Airport Express (AE) buses depart from clearly marked stops outside the terminals.

likely_response.local: Za deset minut od stanoviště C.
likely_response.translation_en: In ten minutes from stop C.

responses.english: In ten minutes from stop C.
responses.local: Za deset minut od stanoviště C.
